notes: Curated benchmark candidates for evaluating whether DDO improves prompts. Use held-out scoring examples and do not optimize on the final scoring split.

benchmarks.name: IFEval
benchmarks.why_use: Directly measures instruction following, format compliance, constraints, and output structure, which are common DDO repair targets.

benchmarks.name: GSM8K
benchmarks.why_use: Tests multi-step arithmetic reasoning and exact final-answer formatting.

benchmarks.name: BIG-Bench Hard
benchmarks.why_use: Covers hard reasoning tasks with target labels and exact-match style scoring; useful after IFEval and GSM8K are stable.

benchmarks.name: PromptBench
benchmarks.why_use: Provides prompt engineering and adversarial prompt evaluation tooling for comparing DDO against prompt variants.
